meta.title: OpenClaw Dashboard
meta.description: A local-first dashboard for OpenClaw agents, usage, provider limits, and scheduler health.

hero.title: OpenClaw Dashboard
hero.copy: Track agent activity, usage history, provider limits, and scheduler status from local data at {home}.
hero.statusPartialHint: Some local snapshot data is unavailable.
hero.pulseCopy: Saved profiles and the active rolling limits.

demo.copy: No local ~/.openclaw install was found, so the dashboard is showing the bundled demo dataset. Set OPENCLAW_HOME or create ~/.openclaw to switch to live data.

usage.topModelDescription: Model mix from the latest usage report.

scheduler.title: Cron Health
scheduler.description: Upcoming jobs and attention items from cron/jobs.json.

agents.title: Agents Office
agents.copy: See which OpenClaw agents are active, waiting, or blocked across the office floor.
agents.virtualDescription: A pixel office full of lobster agents, grouped by room so busy desks and idle desks stand apart instantly.
agents.virtualBoardCopy: Each observed agent becomes a lobster coworker in the office, with room zones, desk placement, and status lights rendered from live state.
agents.floorDescription: A room-by-room snapshot of desks, queues, and handoffs.
agents.queuesDescription: Where work is collecting and which desks need relief next.
agents.activityDescription: Latest agent updates pulled from the dashboard snapshot.
agents.roomFocusHint: Click a room to zoom into that crew and filter the rails on the right.
agents.roomMissionIdle: No live mission ownership is assigned here right now.
agents.roomEmpty: No one is seated here right now.
agents.noAgents: No agent snapshot is available yet.
agents.noAgentsHint: Add agents/dashboard.json or expose session logs under agents/*/sessions.
agents.missionQueueCopy: Live Mission Control tasks for the current room stay visible here, so you can inspect ownership without leaving the office view.
agents.missionQueueEmpty: No live Mission Control tasks are routed through this room right now.
agents.boardCopy: Rooms are arranged by workflow so hot spots show up immediately.
agents.laneBoardCopy: Queue lanes are sized by backlog so the next bottleneck is obvious.
agents.deskFeedCopy: Agents ordered by the freshest observed handoff or event.
agents.attentionCopy: Blocked desks and the heaviest lanes surface here first.
agents.timelineCopy: Newest activity across all observed agents.

missionControl.title: Mission Control
missionControl.copy: Track Launchpad delivery work, review queues, and release readiness from the same workstation.
missionControl.overviewDescription: Feature lanes, delivery checkpoints, and the worker pulse from Agent Launchpad.
missionControl.queueDescription: Ready, running, review, and blocked tasks across the office.
missionControl.reviewDescription: Human confirmations, PR checks, and review tasks waiting on a decision.
missionControl.releaseDescription: Features closest to shipping, with branch and PR evidence attached.
missionControl.queueEmpty: No tasks in this lane right now.
missionControl.noReview: Nothing is waiting for review right now.
missionControl.noRelease: No feature is currently lined up for release.
missionControl.noMissionControlHint: Start Agent Launchpad once or expose the state file to replace the bundled sample.
missionControl.intakeDescription: Capture a new operator request here and push it straight into the Launchpad delivery queue.
missionControl.intakeError: Unable to create this mission right now.
missionControl.intakeTitlePlaceholder: Build mission control intake inside openclaw-dashboard
missionControl.intakeDetailsPlaceholder: Describe the operator goal, the surface to change, and what done should look like.
missionControl.actionError: Unable to update this task right now.

history.title: History Trend
history.description: Requests and tokens across normalized reports.
history.descriptionUnavailable: Normalized history powers the next chart layer, even when report formats evolve.
history.requestsWindowHint: Requests across the most recent window
history.tokensWindowHint: Total tokens across the same report window
history.average: Average per report: {requests} requests and {tokens} tokens.

data.historyUnavailable: No normalized usage history available yet.
data.generateReportHint: Generate a report first or point OPENCLAW_HOME at a populated install.
data.demoFallbackNote: Showing bundled demo data because no local OpenClaw home was found.
data.normalizedReportsOne: Normalized {count} usage report for the trend view.
data.normalizedReportsOther: Normalized {count} usage reports for the trend view.
data.usageReportsNote: Usage data comes from markdown reports under workspace/memory/usage.
data.quotaLiveModelsNote: Quota values are refreshed from live `openclaw models` output.
data.quotaLiveSessionNote: Quota values are refreshed from the latest `session_status` log when `openclaw models` is unavailable.
data.quotaSnapshotNote: Quota values currently come from the latest usage report snapshot.
data.parserCompatibilityNote: The parser accepts both the newer account-status format and older quota-only report formats.
